# CopiioAI

> CopiioAI turns any API into a chat-based interface. Developers connect or capture APIs; non-developers query them in plain language. No frontend required.

## Product
- https://copiioai.com/ : Homepage — product overview, features, use cases, and how-it-works
- https://copiioai.com/privacy-policy : Privacy Policy

## Key Facts
- Category: Developer tool / no-code API-to-chat interface
- Pricing: Free tier available via Chrome Web Store
- Platform: Chrome Extension, Web
- Use cases: Internal dashboards, ops/analytics queries, admin and support tools, sharing APIs with non-technical users
- Target users: Developers who want to expose APIs as chat tools; non-developers who want to query real-time data without coding

## Contact
- Support: support@copiioai.com
- Twitter: @CopiioAI
